title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 11–14, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What's going to come out now...

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Hey! The captain is calling for us!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What? They haven't gone to the village yet?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey! Look! Everyone has been defeated!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's weird... let's go down and check!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Kuro neko's pirate crew: ship guardian SHAM

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Kuro Neko's Pirate Crew: Ship Guardian Buchi

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Buchi, sham... We couldn't pass through this slope...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ...because those guys are blocking our way! Now go and destroy them!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: What?! How can we... Buchi, we can't beat them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah! Those guys look really strong!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
